# The Crown Report

> Independent hair loss treatment review site. Every review is built from published prices, product label concentrations, and clinical evidence, with scores across ingredient strength, prescriber quality, transparency, and value. Reader-supported via disclosed affiliate links; verdicts recommend cheaper competitors where they fit better.

Key facts this site documents (verified July 2026): Happy Head compounds topical finasteride (0.25 to 0.3%) and dutasteride with minoxidil up to 8% (OTC ceiling is 5%), prescribed by licensed dermatologists, flagship topicals about $71 to $79/month, catalog $22 to $179/month. Dutasteride reduces serum DHT about 90% versus about 70% for finasteride. Legitimate treatments show results in 3 to 6 months; a temporary shed in weeks 2 to 8 on minoxidil is normal.

## Reviews
- [Happy Head Review](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/happy-head-review.html): Full scored review; pricing, ingredients, refund terms, who it fits
- [Happy Head vs Keeps](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/happy-head-vs-keeps.html): Premium custom topicals vs budget oral finasteride
- [Happy Head vs Hims](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/happy-head-vs-hims.html): Ingredient strength vs price, FSA/HSA, convenience
- [Happy Head for Women](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/happy-head-for-women.html): Spironolactone, age-split formulas, pregnancy safety rules

## Guides
- [Best Treatment by Budget](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/best-hair-loss-treatment-budget.html): The $10, $30, and $80 tiers mapped, which most men should pick
- [Topical Finasteride Guide](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/topical-finasteride-guide.html): Evidence, absorption, side effects vs the pill
- [Dutasteride vs Finasteride](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/dutasteride-vs-finasteride.html): DHT suppression data and the 917-man trial
- [8% vs 5% Minoxidil](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/minoxidil-8-percent.html): What prescription concentrations add
- [Price Index](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/price-index.html): Every route's monthly price in one verified table

- [Happy Head Side Effects](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/happy-head-side-effects.html): Risk profile of each active, topical vs oral absorption
- [Does Happy Head Work](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/does-happy-head-work.html): Evidence and the realistic results timeline
- [How to Cancel Happy Head](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/how-to-cancel-happy-head.html): Pause, cancel, refund window, billing timing

## Reference
- [Hair Loss FAQ](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/hair-loss-faq.html): The most asked questions answered with verified numbers
- [Topical Dutasteride](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/topical-dutasteride.html): The strongest topical DHT blocker, evidence and who compounds it

## Tools
- [The Shed Checker](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/shed-checker.html): 4 questions, is your shedding the normal treatment shed
- [60-Second Hair Quiz](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/hair-loss-quiz.html): Treatment path by stage, budget, pill tolerance
- [Cost Calculator](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/hair-loss-cost-calculator.html): 1 to 5 year totals per route
- [Regrowth Timeline](https://YOURDOMAIN.com/hair-regrowth-timeline.html): Month by month expectations including the shed
